trust_report.doctrine: null-over-guess; deterministic fields anchored to CDS/Scorecard with provenance; high-stakes fields blind-verified; arithmetic-gated; every source consulted is logged

overall_acceptance_rate.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
overall_acceptance_rate.quote: C1 residency totals: 'Total first-time, first-years who applied 109,112' / 'Total first-time, first-years who were admitted 17,915'. Acceptance rate computed 17,915/109,112 = 16.42% (CDS reports counts, not the rate).

applications_total.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
applications_total.quote: C1: 'Total first-time, first-years who applied         109,112' (residency Total column). Corroborated by sex totals: males 53,044 + females 56,068 = 109,112.

admits_total.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
admits_total.quote: C1: 'Total first-time, first-years who were admitted         17,915'. Corroborated by sex totals: males admitted 7,593 + females admitted 10,322 = 17,915.

enrolled_total.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
enrolled_total.quote: C1: 'Total first-time, first-years who enrolled         8,178'. Corroborated by sex totals: males enrolled 3,499 + females enrolled 4,679 = 8,178; and B2 first-year Total = 8,178.

yield_rate.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
yield_rate.quote: Computed from C1 verbatim counts: enrolled 8,178 / admitted 17,915 = 45.65%. (CDS does not print a yield rate.)

admits_class_size.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
admits_class_size.quote: C1: 'Total first-time, first-years who enrolled         8,178' — the enrolled first-year class size.

sat_composite_middle_50.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
sat_composite_middle_50.quote: C9: 'SAT Composite  25th Percentile 1370  50th Percentile 1470  75th Percentile 1530'. Middle-50 = 25th-75th = 1370-1530.

sat_reading_middle_50.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
sat_reading_middle_50.quote: C9: 'SAT Evidence-Based Reading and Writing  25th 690  50th 730  75th 750'. Middle-50 = 690-750.

sat_math_middle_50.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026

act_composite_middle_50.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026

test_submission_rate.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
test_submission_rate.quote: C9: 'Submitting SAT Scores 55% 4,503' and 'Submitting ACT Scores 18% 1,462'. Combined share submitting any test = 55% + 18% = 73% (4,503 + 1,462 = 5,965 of 8,178 enrolled).

gpa_unweighted_avg.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
gpa_unweighted_avg.quote: C12: 'Average high school GPA: 3.9'; C12 'Percent submitting high school GPA: 97.8%'. C11 reports GPA distribution 'using 4.0 scale', so 3.9 is the unweighted (4.0-scale) average.

race_white.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
race_white.quote: B2 (Degree-seeking First-time First-year column): 'White, non-Hispanic 3,616'. Of first-year Total 8,178 → 44.22%.

race_black.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
race_black.quote: B2 (first-year column): 'Black or African American, non-Hispanic 487'. Of Total 8,178 → 5.96%.

race_hispanic.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026

race_asian.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026

race_native_american.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
race_native_american.quote: B2 (first-year column): 'American Indian or Alaska Native, non-Hispanic 19'. Of Total 8,178 → 0.23%.

race_pacific_islander.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
race_pacific_islander.quote: B2 (first-year column): 'Native Hawaiian or other Pacific Islander, non-Hispanic 13'. Of Total 8,178 → 0.16%.

race_two_or_more.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
race_two_or_more.quote: B2 (first-year column): 'Two or more races, non-Hispanic 510'. Of Total 8,178 → 6.24%.

race_unknown.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
race_unknown.quote: B2 (first-year column): 'Race and/or ethnicity unknown 546'. Of Total 8,178 → 6.68%.

race_international.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
race_international.quote: B2 (first-year column): 'Nonresidents 391' (international students reported only under Nonresidents). Of Total 8,178 → 4.78%.

international_percentage.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
international_percentage.quote: B2 (first-year column): 'Nonresidents 391' of Total 8,178 → 4.78% of the entering first-year class are international (nonresident).

freshman_retention_rate.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
freshman_retention_rate.quote: B22 Retention Rates: cohort entering Fall 2024 = 7,251; still enrolled Fall 2025 = 7,068; 'Calculate the percentage of the Fall 2024 entering cohort who remained enrolled... 97%'.

graduation_rate_4_year.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
graduation_rate_4_year.quote: B (2019 cohort): line C 'Final 2019 cohort, after adjusting for allowable exclusions ... Total 6,808'; line D 'completed the program in four years or less (by Aug. 31, 2023) ... Total 5,601'. 4-yr rate = 5,601/6,808 = 82.27% (CDS prints the underlying counts but not this percentage).

graduation_rate_6_year.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
graduation_rate_6_year.quote: B line H: 'Six-year graduation rate for 2019 cohort (G divided by C) ... Total 93%' (same 93% reported for the 2018 cohort).

in_state_tuition.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
in_state_tuition.quote: G1 (PUBLIC INSTITUTION FIRST-YEAR UNDERGRADUATES, tuition only): 'Tuition: In-district: $17,864 $19,015'; 'In-state (out-of-district)' blank. First column $17,864 reported (a second column shows $19,015). Scorecard latest in-state tuition = $17,736 corroborates.
in_state_tuition.as_of_cycle: 2025-2026 CDS (G1 lists 2026-2027 academic-year costs; first column $17,864)

median_earnings_10yr.source: U.S. Dept of Education College Scorecard API
median_earnings_10yr.quote: College Scorecard data (UNITID 170976) field 'latest.earnings.10_yrs_after_entry.median': 83648 — median earnings of students 10 years after entry, $83,648.

is_test_optional.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
is_test_optional.quote: C8: 'Does your institution make use of SAT or ACT scores in admission decisions...: Yes'. The 'SAT or ACT' row is checked under 'Recommended' / 'Not required for admission, but considered if submitted' — i.e., tests are not required (test-optional).

test_policy_details.value: Test-optional: SAT/ACT recommended but not required; considered if submitted. Latest SAT/ACT receipt date 2/1. Not used for academic advising. Institutional exam used for placement.
test_policy_details.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
test_policy_details.quote: C8: SAT or ACT row checked 'Recommended' (and 'Not required for admission, but considered if submitted'); C8E 'Latest date by which SAT or ACT scores must be received for fall-term admission: 2/1'; C8D advising use: 'No'.

waitlist_offered.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
waitlist_offered.quote: C2 WAITING LIST: 'Number of qualified applicants offered a place on waiting list: 24,447'.

waitlist_accepted.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
waitlist_accepted.quote: C2 WAITING LIST: 'Number accepting a place on the waiting list: 18,435'.

waitlist_admitted.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
waitlist_admitted.quote: C2 WAITING LIST: 'Number of wait-listed students admitted: 1,663'.

waitlist_admit_rate.source: University of Michigan-Ann Arbor Common Data Set 2025-2026
waitlist_admit_rate.quote: Computed from C2: admitted 1,663 / accepted a waitlist place 18,435 = 9.02% (admit rate among those who accepted a waitlist spot; vs 6.80% of the 24,447 offered). CDS does not print this rate.

notes: CDS located (2025-2026 (latest available; 2026-2027 not yet posted))

VERIFIED CDS source. Downloaded 67-page PDF; page 1 reads exactly 'Common Data Set 2025-2026'; A1 address shows 'University of Michigan', 'City: Ann Arbor', 'State: Michigan', 'Zip: 48109'. This is the most recent CDS edition available.

UMich official Common Data Set 2025-2026 PDF (67 pages). Extracted via pypdf to /tmp/cds_full.txt. Source for C1/C2 admissions+waitlist, C8 test policy, C9 SAT/ACT percentiles & % submitting, C11/C12 GPA, B2 race/ethnicity counts, B22 retention (97%), B graduation grids (6-yr 93%, 4-yr derived 82.27%), G1/G5 tuition & expense components. Note: this is the 2025-2026 CDS (Fall 2025 entering class), NOT a 2026-2027 CDS — that cycle is not yet published; G1 cost lines are labeled 2026-2027 academic year.

C1 residency totals: 'Total first-time, first-years who applied 109,112' / 'Total first-time, first-years who were admitted 17,915'. Acceptance rate computed 17,915/109,112 = 16.42% (CDS reports counts, not the rate).

C1 residency table 'First-Time, First-Year Student Applicants In-State Out-of-State International Unknown Total' has the In-State/Out-of-State/International columns left blank; only the Total column (109,112 / 17,915 / 8,178) is populated, so no in-state acceptance rate is reported.
C1 residency table In-State/Out-of-State/International columns are blank; only Total applied/admitted/enrolled (109,112 / 17,915 / 8,178) reported. No out-of-state acceptance rate available.

Official College Scorecard API (UNITID 170976). Source for median_earnings_10yr = $83,648 (latest.earnings.10_yrs_after_entry.median). Also returned corroborating admission_rate 0.1564, completion_rate_4yr_150nt 0.932, tuition in_state 17,736 / out_of_state 60,946, COA academic_year 34,654, SAT average 1465 — used only to cross-check CDS values. Authenticated with the Scorecard app's embedded public api_key plus Referer/Origin headers (DEMO_KEY was rate-limited).
College Scorecard data (UNITID 170976) field 'latest.earnings.10_yrs_after_entry.median': 83648 — median earnings of students 10 years after entry, $83,648.

Official application plans page. 403 on live fetch; read via Wayback raw capture 20260530 (May 2026, Fall 2026 cycle). Primary source for ED/EA/RD deadlines, binding status, financial aid deadlines, decision dates, and commitment dates. Confirms ED is new and binding for fall 2026.

Official requirements & deadlines page. 403 on live fetch; read via Wayback raw capture 20251231 (Fall 2026 cycle). Source for platforms (Common Application, $75 fee), application checklist, required materials, plan deadlines/notification dates, SMTD Dec 1 deadline, and 'Schools and Colleges With Additional Application Requirements' (portfolios, CS major selection).

OFFICIAL U-M Sec. 245 Performance Report Card (dated 4/10/2025). Quotable first-destination outcomes for Class of 2024: FT employment 54%, part-time 7%, further education 26%, other 13%, response rate 58%. Source of the only verified employment/grad-school figures (but they are ~9-month first-destination, not 2-year, so fields left null). Contains NO loan default rate and NO employer list.

Consultant breakdown of direct first-year Ross vs cross-campus transfer: recruiting-timing advantage of early entry, ~30-35% transfer admit among qualified, and the standard fallback majors (Econ, IOE, Information Analysis). Used for tactical framing only; its 'Preferred Admission' terminology conflicts with official U-M usage, so I deferred to U-M for definitions.
